headline: Stock Market Today, March 27: Unity Software Surges on Vector AI Guidance
summary: On March 27, 2026, investors weighed Unity’s Vector AI-fueled Q1 revenue hike against a sweeping overhaul of its ads and gaming portfolio.

headline: 3 High Growth Companies With Significant Insider Ownership
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has experienced a 1.6% drop, yet it remains up by 15% over the past year with earnings expected to grow by 16% annually. In this context, identifying growth companies with significant insider ownership can be crucial as these firms often benefit from aligned interests between management and shareholders, potentially positioning them well for future success.

headline: Unity Software Surges 10% as China Sale Talk Heats Up: Can It Close the Gap With AppLovin?
summary: Unity Software (NYSE:U) stock is skyrocketing on two major catalysts Friday morning. The main share-price drivers are reports of a China business sale and a blowout preliminary revenue update. Shares are up 10%, climbing from an opening price of $17.13 to around $19. The rally offers a moment of relief for investors who have watched ... Unity Software Surges 10% as China Sale Talk Heats Up: Can It Close the Gap With AppLovin?

headline: Discover Precigen And 2 Other Insider-Favored Growth Stocks
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has experienced a 1.6% drop, yet it remains up by 15% over the past year with earnings projected to grow by 16% annually. In this environment, growth companies with high insider ownership can be particularly appealing as they often signal confidence from those closest to the business and may offer potential opportunities for investors seeking alignment of interests.
